CreateRoutingRules.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
CreateRoutingRules.sourceAddress: Source CIDR block; accepts all traffic (0.0.0.0/0), an existing subnet CIDR within the VPC, or a sub-range of a subnet
CreateRoutingRules.nexthopId: Next-hop ID; required when creating a single-path route
CreateRoutingRules.nexthopType: Route type; required when creating a single-path route. Values: "custom" (BCC), "vpn" (VPN), "nat" (NAT), "dcGateway" (Direct Connect gateway), "peerConn" (peering connection; nexthopId must be the local interface ID, e.g. qpif-abuf50qxxxxx, not the peering connection ID)
CreateRoutingRules.nextHopList: Next-hop list for multi-path routes; required when creating a multi-path route
CreateRoutingRules.nextHopList.nexthopType: Route type; currently only supports Direct Connect gateway: "dcGateway"
CreateRoutingRules.nextHopList.pathType: Multi-path mode. "ecmp" for load balancing; "ha:active" or "ha:standby" for primary/backup mode
CreateRoutingRules.description: Route table rule description; maximum 200 characters
